title: Blackmoor 65499 50pcs Air Fryer Liners/Food Grade Greaseproof Parchment/Multipurpose for Other Cooker Types Inc. Steamers, Microwaves and Ovens / 16 x 16 x 4cm
features: AIR FRYER LINERS – This pack of 50 paper liners are made from food grade parchment paper and are sized at 16 x 16 x 4cm. They effectively keep food residue away from your air fryer to keep it clean after use.

DURABLE – The heavy-duty liners are waterproof, oil-proof, non-stick and heat resistant and can withstand a maximum temperature of 220°C. Their 4cm raised edge is enough to prevent food leaking and sticking, oil spills and food residue.

EASY TO USE – The non-stick liners can be placed directly into the air fryer and do not need to be torn, bent, cut, or folded before use. Compared with silicone air fryer liners, air fryer paper liners are more convenient and make it easier to transfer food to your plate.

WIDE APPLICATION – The liners are suitable to use in air fryers, steamers, microwaves, and ovens. The liners can extend the lifespan of your air fryer as they prevent spills and splatters sticking to the bottom and sides of the basket.

BLACKMOOR - Blackmoor is the market leading provider of the very best kitchen essentials to inspire the everyday home cook. Find everything from pots and pans, to knife sets, bakeware essentials and cooking utensils all at the Blackmoor Amazon store page today!
description: Product Description Air Fryer Liners 50 pack This pack of 50 paper liners are made from food-grade parchment paper and are each sized at 16 x 16 x 4cm. They effectively keep food residue away from your air fryer to keep it clean after use. The heavy-duty liners can withstand a maximum temperature of 220°C. Their 4cm raised edge is enough to prevent food leaking and sticking, oil spills, and food residue. The non-stick liners can be placed directly into the air fryer and do not need to be torn, bent, cut, or folded before use. The liners can extend the lifespan of your air fryer as they prevent spills and splatters from sticking to the bottom and sides of the basket. KEY FEATURES: 50 pack Non-stick Disposable Water and oil proof Versatile DIMENSIONS They each measure 16 x 16 x 4cm and can be placed directly into the air fryer. VERSATILE KITCHEN ESSENTIALS The liners are suitable for use in air fryers, steamers, microwaves, and ovens. SAFE AND HYGIENIC The disposable liners are waterproof, oil-proof, non-stick, and heat-resistant.
